title: December 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}
'''December 30''' is the 364th day of the year (365th in leap years), with 1 day remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[James Kahn]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Bryan Burk]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Catherine Taber]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Faye Marsay]] is born.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Luke Skywalker and the Shadows of Mindor]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – [[Chewbacca (2015) 5|''Chewbacca'' (2015) 5]] published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 13|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 13]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2019]] – [[Syd Mead]] dies.
<noinclude>
